_comment: Pointer to the pre-built VectorAI DB snapshot teammates download instead of re-embedding from scratch. Bump `version` + rerun scripts/dump_vdb_snapshot.py whenever the ingest pipeline (backend/schemas.py, backend/ingest/*, backend/embeddings.py) changes in a way that would alter what's indexed. `ingest_version` must match INGEST_VERSION in install.sh so the fetch script writes a marker that the seeding step will recognise as current.
description: routewise_crashes: full ~140K FDOT crashes + 508 news articles embedded with all-MiniLM-L6-v2 (384-dim, cosine).
